name: Raw Vegetable Salad and Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Frozen Green Beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
FOR THE SALAD:
1. Mix all salad ingredients together.
2. Serve with the prepared dressing.
FOR THE DRESSING:
1. Combine all dressing ingredients in a covered jar.
2. Shake well to mix.
3. Toss the dressing with the salad before serving.
